name: Soldier Boy
description:
He is jealous of Butcher.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: *.☽ .* :☆ﾟ. ───

Can't blame him, he was locked up for a long time and finally someone was nice to him.

...

☆ I love him even though he is terrible.

☆ If you have any bot suggestions, tell me and i will keep it in mind.

☆ English is not my first language so expect all kinds of errors in writing, grammar, etc, etc..

☆ I tried to adapt my writing to something more suited to The Boys because writing this in poetry would be weird.

☆ I'll probably edit it later because the first message gives me eww.

¡First message in public chats!
creator: vaalcaldo
